meta.title: Free daily picks via Telegram | BetsPlug
meta.description: Top 3 AI football predictions delivered to Telegram daily. Free, no signup, no email required.

hero.subheadline: Get our top 3 daily AI football predictions delivered straight to Telegram. Free, no signup, no email required.

cards.title: Top 3 daily picks
cards.body: Our engine's highest-confidence predictions of the day, across major leagues. Sent every morning at 8:00 CET.

cards.title: Match context
cards.body: Brief reasoning per pick: why our engine selected this match and market. Not just numbers, but understanding.

cards.title: Result updates
cards.body: After matches conclude, we post results: wins and losses both. Track our channel performance week by week.

paragraphs: Telegram is fast, secure, and works on every device. We deliver picks where you check your phone, not buried in email folders. Notifications appear immediately when matches matter.
There's no spam. We send 3 picks per day, plus result updates. Unsubscribe anytime by leaving the channel — no account deletion required.

upgradePath.h2: Want more than 3 picks per day?
upgradePath.body: Telegram channel is our free tier in messaging form. Subscribers get unlimited daily predictions across 30+ leagues, full match analysis, and personalized notifications.

questions.q: Do I need a BetsPlug account?
questions.a: No. Telegram channel is open without account creation. Just join the channel and you'll receive daily picks.

questions.q: Can I get notifications for specific leagues?
questions.a: The free Telegram channel sends top 3 picks across all leagues. For league-specific or bet-type-specific notifications, our paid plans include customizable Telegram alerts.
Same accuracy as our website free tier — same engine, same methodology. Verify performance via our public track record.

questions.q: Why only 3 picks per day on Telegram?
questions.a: Free tier limit. Subscribers receive unlimited predictions plus customized Telegram notifications based on confidence thresholds and league preferences.
